title: The Top 9 Arthritis Herbal Creams for Pain Relief
description: Capsicum annuum creams are made from the extract of sweet peppers. They contain a chemical called capsaicin, which is good for arthritis pain. When capsaicin is applied to the skin, it blocks the pain messages sent to the brain, giving you relief from pain and discomfort. It also reduces inflammation, which is a major cause of arthritis. This means that capsaicin creams can help to ease stiffness and swelling in the joints. Some people find that using capsaicin creams reduces their nee...
